description_long: This is a large, single-family house set within a fenced rectangular lot, surrounded by manicured green lawns and lined with flowering trees along the perimeter. The house features a complex, multi-gabled dark gray roof and light-colored exterior walls, with several large windows distributed across the facade. A spacious driveway leads to a garage on one side, while the opposite side opens to a backyard area with a patio or terrace. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the landscaping includes a row of evenly spaced trees along the front and side boundaries. The main entrance is prominent, with a covered porch and steps leading up to the front door. The overall design is modern suburban, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical layout.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light walls, and a fenced yard lined with flowering trees. Features include a driveway, garage, patio, and a prominent covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a row of flowering trees along the front fence.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the side yard with additional trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio area, rear facade, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees along the back fence.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the house, the driveway, and the full row of trees along the side boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, prominent front door, and minimal decorative elements
